Value: TWAS eQTL source confounding evaluation: systematic comparison of GTEx v8 and eQTLGen weights using HOTAIR binding proteins in diabetic complications

This dataset supports the investigation of how eQTL weight source selection (GTEx v8 tissue-specific vs. eQTLGen large-scale whole blood) systematically biases TWAS cross-population replication conclusions. It contains processed S-PrediXcan TWAS results for 104 genes (30 HOTAIR candidate binding proteins, 44 non-candidate HOTAIR-binding proteins, 30 T2DM GWAS controls) across three diabetic microvascular complications (DR, DN, DPN) using both GTEx v8 MASHR multi-tissue weights and eQTLGen whole-blood cis-eQTL weights. Key results include paired Z-scores for cross-source comparison, Mahalanobis matching pairs for covariate-controlled enrichment analysis, and FDR enrichment rates by group, phenotype, and eQTL source.
eQTL source selection systematically biases TWAS cross-population replication: a quantitative evaluation using HOTAIR binding proteins in diabetic complications
